title: Real gundams, top 3D generator, open-source world models, ChatGPT updates, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search presents a curated roundup of 25+ recent AI tools and research papers including 3D generation, world models, language models, text-to-speech, and multimodal systems. Notable releases include Pixal3D for 3D object generation, Sana-WM for world models, MiniCPM vision model, Krea2 design tool, and ChatGPT Finance plugin.
